steps.title: Convert furlongs to feet
steps.content: The conversion factor is: $$1\text{ furlong}=220\text{ yards}=220\times3\text{ feet}=660\text{ feet}$$

steps.title: Compute total feet for 61 furlongs
steps.content:
Multiply the number of furlongs by the feet per furlong: $$61\text{ furlongs}=61\times660\text{ feet}$$
Compute: $$61\times660=(60\times660)+(1\times660)=39600+660=40260\text{ feet}$$
The answer is 40260.
